subject: Re: Locating Particle Quality Scores
body:
Gotcha; thanks so much!

On Thursday, July 28, 2022 at 6:24:30 AM UTC-4 Chris Dienemann wrote:

> Hi Emma,
>
> Warp writes a _rlnAutopickFigureOfMerit to the matchings star files 
> (located in matching/*_boxnet-suffix.star) as well as the 
> good/all_particles star files (when you extract on-the-fly). 
>
> Best,
> Chris
>
> 216em...@gmail.com schrieb am Sonntag, 17. Juli 2022 um 18:18:44 UTC+2:
>
>> Hi all,
>>
>> I was wondering where I could find the quality score of each individual 
>> particle. Is it written. to the star files somewhere? Thanks so much!
>>
>> Best,
>> Emma
>>
>
